changeSet.author: Manuel Abascal
changeSet.comment: Update Windows visualizations to match logstash filter v3.1.0 field transformations
changeSet.sql: UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.wineventlogEventData', 'log.eventData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.wineventlogEventData%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.wineventlogEventData', 'log.eventData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.wineventlogEventData%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.wineventlog.event_data.', 'log.eventData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.wineventlog.event_data.%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.wineventlog.event_data.', 'log.eventData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.wineventlog.event_data.%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlog.event_data.', 'log.eventData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.event_data.%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlog.event_data.', 'log.eventData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlog.event_data.%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlogEventData', 'log.eventData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlogEventData%' AND aggregation NOT LIKE '%log.wineventlogEventData%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlogEventData', 'log.eventData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlogEventData%' AND filters NOT LIKE '%log.wineventlogEventData%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.record_number', 'log.recordNumber') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.record_number%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.record_number', 'log.recordNumber') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.record_number%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlogEventCreated', 'log.eventCreated') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlogEventCreated%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlogEventCreated', 'log.eventCreated') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlogEventCreated%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlogEventId', 'log.eventCode') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlogEventId%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlogEventId', 'log.eventCode') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlogEventId%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlogLevel', 'log.level') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlogLevel%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlogLevel', 'log.level') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlogLevel%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlogOpcode', 'log.opcode') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlogOpcode%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlogOpcode', 'log.opcode') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlogOpcode%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlogRecordId', 'log.recordId') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlogRecordId%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlogRecordId', 'log.recordId') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlogRecordId%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlogSourceName', 'log.sourceName') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlogSourceName%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlogSourceName', 'log.sourceName') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlogSourceName%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlog.user_data.', 'log.userData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.user_data.%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlog.user_data.', 'log.userData') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlog.user_data.%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlog.user.name', 'log.userName') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.user.name%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlog.user.name', 'log.userName') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlog.user.name%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlog.user.domain', 'log.userDomain') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.user.domain%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlog.user.domain', 'log.userDomain') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlog.user.domain%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE( aggregation, 'log.winlog.access_type', 'log.accessType'), 'log.winlog.activity_id', 'log.activityId'), 'log.winlog.beat.version', 'log.beatVersion'), 'log.winlog.event.provider', 'log.eventProvider'), 'log.winlog.host.os.version', 'log.hostOsVersion'), 'log.winlog.keywords', 'log.keywords'), 'log.winlog.provider_guid', 'log.providerGuid'), 'log.winlog.tags', 'log.tags') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND (aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.access_type%' OR aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.activity_id%' OR aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.beat.version%' OR aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.event.provider%' OR aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.host.os.version%' OR aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.keywords%' OR aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.provider_guid%' OR aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.tags%');

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE( filters, 'log.winlog.access_type', 'log.accessType'), 'log.winlog.activity_id', 'log.activityId'), 'log.winlog.beat.version', 'log.beatVersion'), 'log.winlog.event.provider', 'log.eventProvider'), 'log.winlog.host.os.version', 'log.hostOsVersion'), 'log.winlog.keywords', 'log.keywords'), 'log.winlog.provider_guid', 'log.providerGuid'), 'log.winlog.tags', 'log.tags') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND (filters LIKE '%log.winlog.access_type%' OR filters LIKE '%log.winlog.activity_id%' OR filters LIKE '%log.winlog.beat.version%' OR filters LIKE '%log.winlog.event.provider%' OR filters LIKE '%log.winlog.host.os.version%' OR filters LIKE '%log.winlog.keywords%' OR filters LIKE '%log.winlog.provider_guid%' OR filters LIKE '%log.winlog.tags%');

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlog.task', 'log.task') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.task%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlog.task', 'log.task') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlog.task%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.winlog.thread_id', 'log.threadId') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.winlog.thread_id%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.winlogEventId', 'log.eventCode') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.winlogEventId%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET aggregation = REPLACE(aggregation, 'log.wineventlogEventId', 'log.eventCode') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND aggregation LIKE '%log.wineventlogEventId%';

UPDATE utm_visualization SET filters = REPLACE(filters, 'log.wineventlogEventId', 'log.eventCode') WHERE id_pattern IN (SELECT id FROM utm_index_pattern WHERE pattern LIKE '%wineventlog%' OR pattern_module = 'WINDOWS_AGENT') AND filters LIKE '%log.wineventlogEventId%';
